# growthbook_attribute (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook targeting attribute by property.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `property` (String) The attribute property name (its unique identifier).

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the attribute is archived.
- `datatype` (String) The attribute datatype.
- `description` (String) Description of the attribute.
- `enum` (String) Comma-separated allowed values when datatype is `enum`.
- `format` (String) The attribute's format.
- `hash_attribute` (Boolean) Whether the attribute is hashed for bucketing.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this attribute is scoped to.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags applied to the attribute.
